input.pr_body:
Reverts HumanSignal/label-studio#8062

Opening just in case. We have seen some strange Selenium test failures in LSE - should all be fixed but in case we need to unblock quickly, merge this PR + corresponding LSE FM PR

         return Response({'created': len(predictions_obj)}, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
